title: Light's Enderite Mod
description: This Mod Adds Enderite Material, Elytra + Chesplate and just adds a little extra to the end dimension.
body:
Adding the Material known as Enderite and making the End Dimension of the Game have a bit more meaning, Giving the Players more reasons to explore the End.
Enderite adds Unique Mechanics like being able to add Elytra Wings to your armor and has unique abilities that make it more worth the grind.
This mod was made by me in a YouTube Video and it became a big part of my channel.  I mainly focused on adding things to the Mod that were sugested by subscribers and others in the comment section.  The videos for this mod have accumulated around 100k views.
